headline: Jim Cramer on Constellation Energy: “The Earnings Have Been Fine, It’s the Zeitgeist That Matters There”
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money as he discussed how semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks are driving the market higher. Cramer started his game plan with the stock, as he commented: We need a game plan for next week, and I happen to have one… Look at this. […]
